title: AccessKeyCreate

name.description: Human-readable label for the key. Auto-generated if omitted.

key.description: Raw secret value. Returned only on create or regenerate.

key_masked.description: Truncated form of the secret safe to display in UIs.

tool_pack_ids.description: Tool packs this key can access. Must be a subset of the parent key's `tool_pack_ids`. Pass `null` for unrestricted access to all tool packs in the organization.

registered_user_ids.description: Registered users this key can access. Must be a subset of the parent key's `registered_user_ids`. Pass `null` for unrestricted access to all registered users in the organization.

scopes.description: Limits which actions this key can perform. Available scopes: `runtime:all` (MCP tool calls), `management:all` (resource management endpoints).

is_test.description: If true, the key can only authenticate test registered users.

expires_at.description: Expiration timestamp. Must be before the parent key's `expires_at`. Defaults to 90 days from now if omitted. Pass `null` explicitly for a key that never expires.

expires_in.description: Seconds until the key expires. Alternative to `expires_at`.

description: Request and response shape for creating or regenerating an access key.
